heading: Advisory group
label: 6605 Advisory group
notes: Amendments2022—Subsec. (c). substituted “chapter 10 of title 5” for “Federal Advisory Committee Act” in heading and “Chapter 10 of title 5” for “The Federal Advisory Committee Act (5 U.S.C. App.)” in text.Pub. L. 117–2862019—Subsec. (a). inserted “, freshwater turtles, or tortoises” after “marine turtles”.Pub. L. 116–9
amendments: Amendments2022—Subsec. (c). substituted “chapter 10 of title 5” for “Federal Advisory Committee Act” in heading and “Chapter 10 of title 5” for “The Federal Advisory Committee Act (5 U.S.C. App.)” in text.Pub. L. 117–2862019—Subsec. (a). inserted “, freshwater turtles, or tortoises” after “marine turtles”.Pub. L. 116–9

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: To assist in carrying out this chapter, the Secretary may convene an advisory group consisting of individuals representing public and private organizations actively involved in the conservation of marine turtles, freshwater turtles, or tortoises.

children.label: A
children.text: ensure that each meeting of the advisory group is open to the public; and

children.label: B
children.text: provide, at each meeting, an opportunity for interested persons to present oral or written statements concerning items on the agenda.

children.heading: Notice
children.label: 2 Notice
children.text: The Secretary shall provide to the public timely notice of each meeting of the advisory group.

children.heading: Minutes
children.label: 3 Minutes
children.text: Minutes of each meeting of the advisory group shall be kept by the Secretary and shall be made available to the public.

children.heading: Exemption from chapter 10 of title 5
children.label: c Exemption from chapter 10 of title 5
children.text: Chapter 10 of title 5 shall not apply to the advisory group.
